package.name: ferox_audio_sim
package.description:
Host-side audio backend for Ferox. Bridges a laptop's microphone and speaker to the Ferox audio topic contract:
publishes /ferox/<robot_id>/audio/mic_raw (AudioChunk) subscribes /ferox/<robot_id>/audio/speaker_out (AudioChunk)
ferox-speech consumes these topics and stays audio-device-agnostic. The same contract is implemented by ferox_audio_go2 / ferox_audio_g1 against real robot hardware — those live in the driver repos.
